questions.question: What is the #1 highest-converting intent signal in Sales Navigator?
questions.explanation: Prospects who changed jobs in the past 90 days are 3x more likely to respond. They're in evaluation mode for new tools and haven't built vendor relationships yet.

questions.question: How long should you engage with a prospect's content before sending a connection request?
questions.explanation: 3-4 days of engagement (likes + comments) increases acceptance rates from 30% to 50%+. It shows genuine interest and makes you familiar before you ask to connect.

questions.question: When should you use InMail instead of a connection request?

options.text: Always — InMail has higher open rates
For C-level prospects with no mutual connections
Never — connection requests are always better
Only after they've ignored 3+ connection requests

questions.explanation: InMail works best for hard-to-reach prospects (C-level, VPs) with no mutual connections or when you need immediate attention (time-sensitive opportunity). Use your 50 monthly credits strategically.

questions.question: What's the ideal weekly prospecting volume for a solo founder using this workflow?
questions.explanation: 25-30 prospects per week is sustainable in 2.5-3 hours. Quality over quantity. Each prospect gets AI research, content engagement, and personalized outreach.

questions.question: True or False: AI-generated prospect briefs should be used as-is without editing.
questions.explanation: False. AI briefs save 70-80% of research time, but you must review and highlight the 2-3 key points that matter for YOUR outreach. The AI doesn't know your positioning or offer — you do.
